sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Rodman & Renshaw initiates Biomea Fusion stock with Buy rating
feed.summary: Rodman & Renshaw has initiated coverage on Biomea Fusion Inc. (NASDAQ:BMEA) with a Buy rating and a price target of $8.00, suggesting over 500% potential upside. The firm believes Biomea's current valuation disconnects from its clinical progress, highlighting "early clinical validation of a genuine disease-modifying mechanism." This comes as Biomea plans Phase II trials for its diabetes drug, icovamenib, despite a recent downgrade from JPMorgan due to concerns regarding type 2 diabetes data.

feed.title: Q3 Results LIVE: Infosys, Groww, HDB Financial Services In Focus
feed.summary: This article provides live updates on Q3 earnings, focusing on companies like Infosys, Groww, HDB Financial Services, and ICICI Prudential Asset Management. Key highlights include Indian Overseas Bank's profit soaring by 63% and Union Bank of India's profit increasing by 9%. Groww's shares erased earlier losses, although its Q3 profit dipped by 28%.

feed.title: Stifel raises Applied Materials stock price target to $340 on strong outlook
feed.summary: Stifel has raised its price target for Applied Materials (NASDAQ:AMAT) to $340 from $250, while maintaining a Buy rating, citing the company's high-quality portfolio and strong ability to address future technology roadmap challenges in the semiconductor industry. The firm anticipates higher peak revenue and profitability for Applied Materials through the upcoming industry upcycle, justifying a higher multiple for the stock. This move aligns with other analysts who have also recently increased their price targets for the semiconductor equipment giant, highlighting its robust market position and improved financial performance.

feed.title: Innodisk unveils the new “AI on Dragonwing” computing series with the first EXMP-Q911 COM-HPC mini module powered by Qualcomm’s SoC | Electronics360
feed.summary: Innodisk has launched its new "AI on Dragonwing" computing series, featuring the EXMP-Q911 COM-HPC Mini module, developed in collaboration with Qualcomm Technologies. This module offers up to 100 TOPS of AI performance with low power consumption and wide-temperature reliability, utilizing Qualcomm Dragonwing SoCs for long-term industrial deployments. The series is part of Innodisk’s AI on ARM portfolio, providing sustainable and scalable ARM-based Edge AI solutions for various industrial applications.

feed.title: Seaport Global upgrades Global Payments stock rating to Buy on Worldpay integration
feed.summary: Seaport Global Securities has upgraded Global Payments (NYSE:GPN) from Neutral to Buy, setting a price target of $109.00, implying a 41% upside. This upgrade is driven by Global Payments moving past a "transition year" in 2025 and integrating Worldpay and Genius businesses in 2026, which is expected to bolster its relevance with small to medium-sized businesses and lead to mid-teens EPS growth and 5% revenue growth in 2026. The company's current valuation at a low P/E ratio relative to near-term earnings growth suggests potential for re-rating as full integration progresses.

feed.title: Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) Posts Better-Than-Expected Sales In Q4 CY2025
feed.summary: Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) reported better-than-expected Q4 CY2025 results, with sales increasing 6.5% year-on-year to $28.37 billion and GAAP profit of $0.98 per share, exceeding analyst estimates. The company showed strong performance in net interest income, net interest margin, and efficiency ratio. Despite some past sluggishness in revenue growth, this quarter indicates solid financial health for the banking giant.

feed.title: Everest Group (NYSE:EG) Rating Increased to Hold at Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research has upgraded Everest Group (NYSE:EG) from a "strong sell" to a "hold" rating, aligning with the current Street consensus. Despite missing EPS estimates last quarter, the company's revenue exceeded expectations, and the stock trades around $320. Recent insider buying and institutional ownership of 92.6% indicate some positive sentiment towards the company.

feed.title: Analysts Mixed on Ulta Beauty Stock (ULTA) Following Outperformance
feed.summary: Analysts hold mixed views on Ulta Beauty (ULTA) after its significant stock outperformance, with some upgrading price targets due to expected market share gains and beauty category growth. Others express caution regarding potential margin pressures from administrative expenses and the impact of a K-shaped consumer recovery. Ulta's strategic execution in managing costs and adapting to consumer preferences will be crucial for its future profitability and stock trajectory.

feed.title: Obermeyer Wealth Partners Sells 2,262 Shares of S&P Global Inc. $SPGI
feed.summary: Obermeyer Wealth Partners has reduced its stake in S&P Global Inc. by 60.1%, selling 2,262 shares and now holding 1,504 shares valued at $732,000. Despite this reduction, S&P Global exceeded Q3 earnings estimates with EPS of $4.73 and revenue of $3.89 billion, and has a consensus "Buy" rating from analysts with an average target price of $615.64. Institutional investors maintain a significant ownership of 87.17% in the company.

feed.title: International Business Machines Corporation $IBM Holdings Raised by Plan Group Financial LLC
feed.summary: Plan Group Financial LLC significantly increased its stake in International Business Machines (IBM) by 25.1% in Q3, now holding 9,256 shares valued at approximately $2.61 million. This increase comes as Wall Street analysts generally rate IBM as a "Moderate Buy," with several firms recently raising their price targets, indicating a positive outlook for the company. IBM also reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and maintains an attractive quarterly dividend of $1.68 per share.

feed.title: WealthPlan Investment Management LLC Has $11.64 Million Holdings in International Business Machines Corporation $IBM
feed.summary: WealthPlan Investment Management LLC significantly reduced its stake in IBM in the third quarter of 2025, selling 2,445 shares but still holding 41,246 shares valued at $11.64 million. IBM exceeded Q3 expectations with strong earnings and revenue growth, and it pays a quarterly dividend of $1.68 per share. Analysts generally rate IBM as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target around $303.

feed.title: Otis expands elevator-focused STEM program for young students globally By Investing.com
feed.summary: Otis, a leading elevator and escalator manufacturer, is expanding its "Little Engineers" STEM education program globally to all markets where it operates. The program teaches primary school students about elevator technology and safety through interactive lessons and hands-on activities, building on its success in Asia and recent expansion to the Middle East. This initiative reinforces Otis's commitment to community engagement and complements its "Made to Move Communities" program for older students.

feed.title: 3 Underfollowed Stocks Wall Street Still Likes-And for Good Reason
feed.summary: This article highlights three underfollowed stocks—Movado Group Inc. (MOV), Nomad Foods Ltd. (NOMD), and Mosaic Co. (MOS)—that Wall Street analysts view favorably despite some recent challenges. Movado is praised for its steady financial performance and strong brand, Nomad shows promise with a new CEO and efficiency programs, and Mosaic, an agricultural materials producer, is seen as having recovery potential due to ongoing demand for its products. All three companies offer compelling dividend yields and significant upside potential according to analysts.

feed.title: Lennox expands commercial HVAC capabilities with new distribution center By Investing.com
feed.summary: Lennox has opened a new 763,000-square-foot Regional Distribution Center in Edgerton, Kansas, to enhance its commercial HVAC operations and improve distribution capacity and fulfillment speed across North America. The company has also relaunched its Commercial Quick Quote tool and expanded its offerings through acquisitions, positioning its commercial business for long-term growth. These developments occur as Lennox maintains a strong financial position, announces a quarterly dividend, and receives updated analyst ratings.

feed.title: How agency pitches are evolving amid industry shake-ups and the ‘algorithm of record’ race
feed.summary: The article discusses how agency pitches are changing due to industry consolidation, particularly after the Omnicom-IPG deal, and advancements in technology like AI. Clients are increasingly concerned about team continuity and are evaluating agencies based on their proprietary operating systems and "algorithm of record" rather than just creative output. This shift presents challenges for large holding companies, which are focusing on tech platforms, and creates opportunities for independent agencies that can offer agility and senior-level attention.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines reported strong Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings, exceeding expectations with an EPS of $1.55 against $1.53. The company achieved record revenue of $58.3 billion for the full year and generated $4.6 billion in free cash flow, the highest in its history. Delta also announced an order for 30 Boeing 787-10s to enhance its international network and confirmed a $1.3 billion profit-sharing payout for employees in February 2026.

feed.title: Citigroup profit slips as expenses rise amid sweeping overhaul
feed.summary: Citigroup reported a 13% drop in fourth-quarter profits, with net income falling to $2.5 billion due to increased expenses that neared $14 billion, despite revenue growth to $19.9 billion. The Wall Street bank is undergoing a major restructuring led by CEO Jane Fraser, which includes anticipated job cuts and a focus on improving profitability. While expenses rose due to a hiring spree and compensation increases in its corporate and investment bank, the restructuring efforts are beginning to show positive results with significant growth in investment banking fees.

feed.title: Tesla sales in Canada fell more than 60% in 2025 amid self-inflicted, EV market stumbles
feed.summary: Tesla's Canadian sales dropped by over 60% in 2025, a significant decline attributed to both company-specific issues and broader electric vehicle market challenges. Sales began to recover once Model Y vehicles from Germany, which are not subject to Canadian counter-tariffs on U.S.-built vehicles, started arriving. However, a full rebound to 2024 levels is not expected in the near future.

feed.title: Martin Marietta Materials: The Quiet Infrastructure Giant Powering America’s Building Boom
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials is

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM) reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, exceeding expectations with an EPS of $5.23 against a forecast of $4.85. The call highlighted robust performance across its businesses, including strong revenue growth in markets, asset management, and auto lease income, alongside significant investments in technology and long-term growth initiatives. Discussions also covered the acquisition of the Apple Card portfolio, concerns about potential credit card APR caps, and the company's outlook for 2026, emphasizing continued investment despite anticipated expense increases.

feed.title: Bank of America Q4 earnings beat, helped by a resilient consumer and businesses (BAC:NYSE)
feed.summary: Bank of America (BAC) reported Q4 earnings and revenue that surpassed Wall Street expectations, driven by higher net interest and noninterest income due to a resilient consumer and business environment. The bank anticipates its net interest income to grow by 5-7% in 2026, building on a strong performance from its Global Banking and Global Wealth and Investment Management segments. All major business units showed revenue growth quarter-over-quarter and year-over-year, with mixed but generally improved profitability.

feed.title: M&T Bank celebrates re-opening of Harrisburg branch
feed.summary: M&T Bank celebrated the grand re-opening of its flagship Downtown Harrisburg branch, which also marked "M&T Bank Day" in Dauphin County. Renovations to the branch at 213 Market Street began in spring 2025 and were completed in December, with the bank remaining operational throughout. The event highlighted M&T Bank's commitment to the community, with local leaders issuing proclamations recognizing its investment and service in Harrisburg.

feed.title: Huge Kansas hub helps Lennox deliver most rooftop AC units in one day
feed.summary: Lennox (NYSE: LII) announced significant investments in its commercial HVAC business, including the opening of its largest Regional Distribution Center in Edgerton, Kansas, spanning 763,000 square feet. These strategic moves aim to enhance product availability, expand distribution capacity, and improve customer experience, enabling the company to deliver over 90% of commercial rooftop units within one day. Additionally, Lennox relaunched its Commercial Quick Quote tool and expanded parts availability through the acquisitions of Duro Dyne and Supco.

feed.title: Lennox Invests in Distribution and Digital Capabilities to Strengthen Commercial HVAC Business
feed.summary: Lennox (NYSE: LII) is making significant investments in its commercial HVAC business to improve product availability, expand distribution capabilities, and enhance the customer experience. Key initiatives include opening a large regional distribution center in Edgerton, Kansas, strengthening production in North America, and relaunching the Commercial Quick Quote tool on LennoxPros for faster online quotes and orders. Additionally, the company has expanded its commercial parts availability through acquisitions of Duro Dyne and Supco.

feed.title: Here Are Wednesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: AppLovin, Blackrock, Citigroup, DoorDash, Fabrinet, KLA Corp, Okta, Rivian and More
feed.summary: This article details Wednesday's top Wall Street analyst upgrades, downgrades, and initiations for various companies, including AppLovin, Blackrock, Citigroup, DoorDash, Fabrinet, KLA Corp, Okta, Rivian, and Uber. It also provides a market overview, noting that stocks were affected by JPMorgan's missed earnings estimates, while positive inflation data offered some relief. The report covers performance in treasury bonds, oil and gas, gold, and cryptocurrency markets.

feed.title: Retirement Planning Group LLC Makes New Investment in Duke Energy Corporation $DUK
feed.summary: Retirement Planning Group LLC has made a new investment in Duke Energy Corporation, acquiring 20,649 shares valued at approximately $2.55 million during Q3. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in Duke Energy, which recently reported Q3 EPS of $1.81, beating estimates, and revenue of $8.54 billion. The company declared a quarterly dividend of $1.065, and analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $136.50.

feed.title: Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO Shares Purchased by Kera Capital Partners Inc.
feed.summary: Kera Capital Partners Inc. significantly increased its stake in Cisco Systems, Inc. by 309.7% in Q3, purchasing an additional 14,469 shares to total 19,141 shares, valued at approximately $1.31 million. This increase in institutional investment comes despite recent insider selling by Cisco executives, including CEO Charles Robbins, who collectively offloaded over 1 million shares. Cisco recently reported strong Q3 earnings, beating estimates with $1.00 EPS and $14.88 billion in revenue, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.41 per share.

feed.title: Kera Capital Partners Inc. Has $4.22 Million Position in United Rentals, Inc. $URI
feed.summary: Kera Capital Partners Inc. significantly increased its stake in United Rentals, Inc. (NYSE:URI) by 1,265.7% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 4,425 shares valued at $4.22 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the construction company, which reported Q3 EPS of $11.70 against a consensus of $12.43 but beat revenue estimates with $4.23 billion. United Rentals currently trades near $939.79, has a market cap of $59.8 billion, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus analyst rating with a $962.61 price target.

feed.title: Kera Capital Partners Inc. Has $3.54 Million Position in Philip Morris International Inc. $PM
feed.summary: Kera Capital Partners Inc. significantly increased its stake in Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE:PM) by 759.4% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 21,838 shares valued at $3.54 million. Despite recent analyst target cuts, Philip Morris maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $189. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $1.47, resulting in an annualized dividend of $5.88 and a 3.5% yield.

feed.title: Retirement Planning Group LLC Has $2.95 Million Stake in PepsiCo, Inc. $PEP
feed.summary: Retirement Planning Group LLC significantly increased its stake in PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ:PEP) by 430.0% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 20,971 shares valued at $2.945 million. This highlights institutional interest in PepsiCo, which currently offers a 4.0% dividend yield. Despite a high dividend payout ratio and some analysts' "Hold" ratings, positive catalysts like AI/supply-chain partnerships and an attractive valuation after recent weakness are noted.

feed.title: Kids build mini elevators as Otis takes Little Engineers worldwide
feed.summary: Otis (NYSE: OTIS) is expanding its Little Engineers STEM program globally, building on its success in Hong Kong and the Asia Pacific where over 800 students have participated. The initiative involves Otis volunteers teaching primary students about the elevator industry through interactive lessons and mini-elevator projects, aiming to foster interest in STEM fields, safety awareness, and community engagement. This expansion, which recently reached the Middle East, aligns with Otis's broader commitment to social impact and developing the future talent pipeline.

feed.title: Kera Capital Partners Inc. Takes $1.44 Million Position in Altria Group, Inc. $MO
feed.summary: Kera Capital Partners Inc. has established a new position in Altria Group, Inc. (NYSE:MO) during the third quarter, acquiring 21,746 shares valued at approximately $1.44 million. Altria boasts a 7.1% dividend yield with a quarterly payout of $1.06 per share and has authorized a $2.0 billion share repurchase program. While analyst opinions are mixed, with some upgrading the stock, the consensus on MarketBeat.com remains "Hold" with a target price of $62.56.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Reshapes Leadership to Speed Digital Transformation
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is restructuring its leadership team to accelerate its digital transformation efforts. The company will create a new chief digital officer position and reassign several senior-leadership responsibilities. These changes will take effect on March 31st, coinciding with Henrique Braun's succession to CEO.

feed.title: Forescout Named Keysight Network Visibility Tech Partner of the Year
feed.summary: Forescout Technologies has been honored as Keysight Technologies, Inc.'s Network Visibility Tech Partner of the Year, recognizing their strong partnership in enhancing network visibility, reducing cyber risk, and streamlining operations. The collaboration focuses on improving security and operational outcomes for customers across various environments, including IT, OT, IoT, and IoMT. This award highlights their joint efforts in innovation, customer success, and go-to-market execution, with plans for expanded initiatives in 2026.

feed.title: Preorder your burger: United flyers can reserve economy meals, cut waste
feed.summary: United Airlines (UAL) is introducing a new meal preordering system for economy passengers on flights over 1,190 miles within North America and the Caribbean, starting March 1, 2026. This initiative aims to give customers more choice and significantly reduce food waste by an estimated 100,000 pounds annually, while also improving catering efficiency. Passengers can preorder meals from five days to 24 hours before departure, with plans to expand menu options and premium beverages later in 2026.

feed.title: New Dexcom CEO Jake Leach talks 2026 roadmap, next-gen tech
feed.summary: Jake Leach, the new CEO of Dexcom, has officially taken the helm and outlined his vision for the company's future, focusing on a 2026 roadmap and next-generation technology. Despite facing challenges like a class action lawsuit and FDA recalls related to its G7 CGM system, Dexcom continues to innovate with products such as the G7 15 Day CGM and the Stelo over-the-counter CGM, alongside new digital features like AI-powered meal logging. Leach discussed plans spanning the coming days, months, and years, emphasizing continued development in diabetes tech.

feed.title: KeyCorp Weighs in on Datadog's Q4 Earnings (NASDAQ:DDOG)
feed.summary: KeyCorp expects Datadog (NASDAQ:DDOG) to report Q4-2025 EPS of $0.14 and FY2026 EPS of $0.65, maintaining an "Overweight" rating and a $170 price target. While many analysts have high price targets and "Buy" ratings, Goldman Sachs initiated a "Sell" rating at $113, creating potential near-term volatility. Additionally, despite recent earnings beats, significant insider selling activity and the stock trading below its 52-week high are noted as cautionary signals.

feed.title: The New South American Calculus - Northern Trust - Commentaries
feed.summary: The article discusses the new South American calculus, focusing on the U.S. intervention in Venezuela and its broader implications for resource control and geopolitical influence in Latin America. It highlights the challenges of reviving Venezuela's oil production and the strategic importance of mineral-rich LATAM nations amidst growing Chinese economic ties. The author concludes that while force can exert power, sustainable economic growth and lasting stability in the region will depend on re-establishing robust policies, markets, and institutions.

feed.title: Responsive Playbooks and the RYTM Inflection
feed.summary: This article analyzes Rhythm Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ: RYTM), highlighting a positive near-term sentiment with a mid-channel oscillation pattern. It presents an exceptional 45.7:1 risk-reward setup, targeting a 13.0% gain versus a 0.3% risk. The piece also details specific AI-generated trading strategies for different risk profiles, including position, momentum, and risk-hedging strategies, along with multi-timeframe signal analysis.

feed.title: Fifth Third (NASDAQ: FITB) cleared to acquire Comerica bank after key approvals
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp has received all necessary regulatory and shareholder approvals to acquire Comerica Incorporated. The Federal Reserve Board's approval follows earlier consent from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency and shareholder votes from both companies. The merger is now expected to close on February 1, 2026, subject to the satisfaction or waiver of remaining conditions in the merger agreement.

feed.title: Honeywell-owned Quantinuum prepares to go public
feed.summary: Honeywell's quantum computing subsidiary, Quantinuum, is reportedly preparing for an initial public offering. This move indicates a growing trend of quantum technology companies seeking public market access. The public offering could provide Quantinuum with significant capital to further its research and development in the rapidly evolving quantum computing space.

feed.title: Best Buy Co. Inc. in 2026: How a Legacy Retailer Is Rebuilding the Future of Tech Shopping
feed.summary: Best Buy Co. Inc. is transforming from a traditional electronics retailer into a hybrid tech platform, services hub, and marketplace. The company focuses on an omnichannel approach, membership programs like My Best Buy, the robust Geek Squad services, and strategic expansion into health-tech and curated brand partnerships. This strategy aims to differentiate Best Buy from competitors like Amazon, Walmart, and Apple by emphasizing human assistance, curated choices, trust, and a strong price-performance balance.

feed.title: AbbVie’s Trump Deal Unlocks US$100bn for R&D & Manufacturing
feed.summary: AbbVie has finalized a voluntary agreement with the Trump administration, becoming the 16th of 17 pharmaceutical companies to do so. This deal includes a US$100 billion investment in manufacturing and R&D over the next decade, with AbbVie providing lower-priced medicines through Medicaid and the TrumpRx platform in exchange for exemption from pharmaceutical import tariffs and protection from future pricing mandates. The agreement aims to enhance medication affordability for American patients and strengthen the domestic healthcare supply chain.

feed.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Goldman Sachs Stock Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: Ahead of its Q4 earnings report, Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS) is expected to announce earnings of $11.57 per share and revenue of $14.11 billion. Investors looking to earn a monthly income from the stock's 1.71% annual dividend yield would need to invest approximately $351,806 (around 375 shares) to generate $500 per month. The article explains how dividend yield is calculated and how it fluctuates with stock price and dividend payment changes.

feed.title: Robeco Schweiz AG Decreases Stake in NXP Semiconductors N.V. $NXPI
feed.summary: Robeco Schweiz AG reduced its stake in NXP Semiconductors N.V. by 19.0% in the third quarter, selling 27,555 shares and retaining 117,845 shares valued at $26.84 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions, and hedge funds collectively own 90.54% of the company's stock. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" rating for NXPI with a consensus target price of $260.62.

feed.title: Robeco Schweiz AG Has $45.10 Million Stake in Mettler-Toledo International, Inc. $MTD
feed.summary: Robeco Schweiz AG reduced its stake in Mettler-Toledo International, Inc. (NYSE:MTD) by 8.2% in the third quarter, holding 36,741 shares valued at $45.10 million. Despite this, other major institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. and Bank of New York Mellon Corp significantly increased their holdings. The stock currently has a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts, with a market capitalization of $30.32 billion and a P/E ratio of 37.02.

feed.title: Touchstone Capital Inc. Buys New Position in Monster Beverage Corporation $MNST
feed.summary: Touchstone Capital Inc. recently disclosed a new position in Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ:MNST), purchasing 143,358 shares valued at approximately $9.65 million during the third quarter. This investment now represents 4.9% of Touchstone Capital Inc.'s investment portfolio, making it their eighth largest holding. Other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. and State Street Corp also significantly increased their stakes in Monster Beverage, highlighting strong institutional interest despite some insider selling activity.

feed.title: Robeco Schweiz AG Lowers Position in Johnson Controls International plc $JCI
feed.summary: Robeco Schweiz AG has reduced its stake in Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE:JCI) by 3.1%, now owning 347,883 shares valued at $38.25 million. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $127.21. The article also notes recent insider selling and details the company's financial performance and upcoming dividend.

feed.title: Robeco Schweiz AG Decreases Stake in Ingersoll Rand Inc. $IR
feed.summary: Robeco Schweiz AG reduced its stake in Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR) by 9.7% in the third quarter, selling 40,955 shares and now owning 380,973 shares valued at $31.48 million. Despite this, other institutions like Norges Bank, Allspring Global Investments, Swedbank AB, Liontrust Investment Partners, and Vanguard Group Inc. significantly increased their holdings in the industrial products company. feed.title: Retirement Planning Group LLC Purchases 2,760 Shares of International Business Machines Corporation $IBM
feed.summary: Retirement Planning Group LLC increased its stake in International Business Machines (IBM) by 75.7% during the third quarter, acquiring an additional 2,760 shares. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the company, with 58.96% of IBM stock now owned by institutional investors. IBM recently announced a quarterly dividend of $1.68 and provided its earnings report, while analysts have issued a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $303.38.
